description_long: This motorcycle features a futuristic, aerodynamic design with a fully enclosed cockpit and a streamlined body. The exterior is primarily metallic gray with copper accents along the frame and trim, giving it a high-tech, modern appearance. The wheels are large and sport alloy rims, with the rear wheel partially covered by a robust fender and a jet-like exhaust structure. The front of the vehicle is sharply angled, with integrated headlights and a transparent canopy that covers the seating area. The side panels are sculpted and include visible air intakes and mechanical detailing, suggesting advanced engineering. The overall build is low to the ground, emphasizing speed and agility, and the vehicle appears to be constructed from a combination of metal, glass, and synthetic materials.
description: A sleek, enclosed, futuristic motorcycle with metallic gray and copper accents, large alloy wheels, and a jet-inspired rear exhaust.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, aerodynamic body, copper trim, and large front and rear wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the jet-like exhaust, rear fender, and the width of the back wheel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the streamlined profile, alloy wheels, and sculpted side panels.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the sharply angled nose, integrated headlights, and transparent canopy.
